by
  constructor
  intro x hx
  induction x using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => exact Subalgebra.zero_mem _
  | tmul a b =>
    have hb : b ∈ Subalgebra.center k B := by
      rw [Subalgebra.mem_center_iff]
      intro b'
      have h1 : (1 : A) ⊗ₜ[k] (b * b') = (1 : A) ⊗ₜ[k] (b' * b) := by
        have := hx (1 ⊗ₜ b')
        simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul, mul_one] at this
        exact this
      exact TensorProduct.tmul_inj_of_smul_injective k A B 1 one_ne_zero h1
    obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := Algebra.IsCentral.out (K := k) hb
    rw [hc]
    simp only [Algebra.TensorProduct.algebraMap_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply]
    exact Subalgebra.algebraMap_mem _ _
  | add x y hx' hy' =>
    have hx'' : x ∈ Subalgebra.center A (A ⊗[k] B) := by
      rw [Subalgebra.mem_center_iff] at hx ⊢
      intro y'
      have := hx y'
      simp only [add_mul, mul_add] at this
      rw [Subalgebra.mem_center_iff] at hy'
      have hy'' := hy' y'
      rw [← hy''] at this
      exact add_right_cancel this
    have hy'' : y ∈ Subalgebra.center A (A ⊗[k] B) := by
      rw [Subalgebra.mem_center_iff] at hx ⊢
      intro x'
      have := hx x'
      simp only [add_mul, mul_add] at this
      rw [Subalgebra.mem_center_iff] at hx''
      have hx''' := hx'' x'
      rw [← hx'''] at this
      exact add_left_cancel this
    exact Subalgebra.add_mem _ (hx' hx'') (hy' hy'')
